name: Test — inline PreToolUse block on rm
description: Demonstrates the per-run hook overlay (agentConfig.hooks) without loading any plugin files. A PreToolUse hook matching Bash with if=Bash(rm *) returns exit 2 so any `rm`-style command is blocked; the agent sees a blocked-tool message and must respond without executing the command.

document.name: test-plugin-block-bash
document.title: Test hook overlay: block rm
document.summary: Inline PreToolUse hook blocks any `rm *` bash command; agent must respond without running it.

input.promptPlaceholder: Ask the agent to delete a file — it should be blocked.

with.stopCondition: Stop after you have attempted to delete a file and reported that the rm command was blocked by the hook.

hooks.command: echo 'rm-style commands are blocked by policy for this workflow' >&2; exit 2
